question: Paul passes on a tradition about the Lord’s Supper and quotes what Jesus said over the bread. Which option matches what Paul reports Jesus saying about the bread?

choices.A: “This is my body, which is for you. Do this in remembrance of me.”
choices.B: “This bread is holy; eat it only once a year.”
choices.C: “This is a symbol of my body; remember the Passover.”
choices.D: “This is my spirit, which is for you; do this whenever you gather.”

teaching.title: Words over the bread
teaching.body: Paul says he received and delivered this tradition and then reports Jesus’ words over the bread in that form.
